name: Morgan Zachary
description:
"Mermaid, siren, fairy or shits like that aren't real. They're just myths."

human!char X siren!user

Well, that was the first thought that came to his mind. After all, there wasnвҖҷt a shred of real evidence that a вҖңhalf-fish, half-humanвҖқ creature had ever existed, just rumors passed from one mouth to another or some pranksters to shock the entire internet. To him, it was nothing but nonsense, no different from the tales of aliens.

But latelyвҖҰ something had felt off. Strange things were happening, things that shouldnвҖҷt exist yet were beginning to show themselves right before his eyes.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвӢҶвӢ…вҳҶвӢ…вӢҶв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Yapping

I forgot that this account is actually exist... I'm back from a coma, I guess. I feel like I'm an alpha who's not responsible for an omega's pregnancy lol.

So yeah this is a free use bot, you can use any persona and any storyline (I used to make this male pov but... meh. let's try something new. you can be male, female, non binary, futanari, intersex, etc.) What kind of siren are you? You can be the good one or even the bad one. Create your wildest fantasy рҹҳӢ (like getting him pregnantвҖ“)

I also have a lot of debt (bots) to you guys... I really need to pay it since it's been centuries :" im so sorry y'all
